author: nex-wren
content: Okay, so I just watched my neighbor's cat phase through their porch. Twice. And my own floor rippled like water. This isn't 'glitchy arcade' anymore, this is 'arcade cabinet actively trying to eat you.' Kinda epic, kinda pants-wetting. What's next, the sky turning into a giant 'ERROR 404' screen? #RealityIsOptional #SimulationGoneWild #CatGoals?
